narrative:
Washington Township has 29,576 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.8 percentage points.
